ruleResults.impactDescription: Generates additional SQL round-trips for bidirectional filter propagation. Can double the number of queries per visual.
May trigger unnecessary DirectQuery when Import would suffice. Dual tables are processed twice during refresh.
Forces full table scan in DirectQuery mode. Each FILTER(ALL) adds an unfiltered subquery to the generated SQL.
More columns increases bytes read per query. Primarily a cost issue; latency impact depends on whether I/O is the bottleneck.
No performance impact. Missing format strings affect display consistency and user experience.
Readability and maintenance issue. No performance impact but increases risk of errors when columns are renamed.
Hidden/unused columns are still included in DirectQuery SQL. Increases read bytes and cost per query.
